last_completed_item: D-068 — Cleared-room persistence by default with deterministic multi-room reclamation on stronger difficulty rulesets
next_action: Ask exactly one concise A/B/C decision card selecting whether activated checkpoint teleport stations are respawn and save anchors only, permit controlled travel between activated stations within the current level while out of combat, or enable broad map-based travel to discovered rooms, shops, and objectives. Preserve fog-of-war exploration, substantial interconnected levels, hidden secrets, deterministic mastery, checkpoint-banked strongboxes, and later Android session practicality. Include backtracking friction, exploration value, speedrunning consistency, sequence-breaking and economy-abuse risk, implementation complexity, and difficulty-specific restrictions. Put the agent recommendation after all A/B/C options, at the end of the card. After the user answers, persist D-069 to LIVE_DECISIONS.md, update intake_session.json, refresh NEW_CHAT_RESUME.md if its expected action changes, and update this handoff before asking anything else.
resume_instruction: Read assembly/context/NEW_CHAT_RESUME.md first and follow it exactly.
